result:
Build is fully green — all three binaries (`wpa_supplicant`, `wpa_cli`, `wpa_passphrase`) linked successfully with no errors.

Fixed 5 compile errors (all root-caused, no workarounds):
1. `src/utils/eloop.c:615` — `timeout->time.seconds` → `.sec` (wrong field name in `os_reltime`).
2. `wpa_supplicant/config_file.c:29` — `os_strlength()` → `os_strlen()` (nonexistent function).
3. `src/rsn_supp/wpa.c:103` — `sm->pairwise_ciph` → `pairwise_cipher` (typo'd struct field).
4. `wpa_supplicant/events.c:132` — `wpa_s->cur_ssid` → `current_ssid` (wrong struct member).
5. `wpa_supplicant/scan.c:1137` — `eloop_register_timeout()` call missing the `user_data` arg; added `, NULL` to match the 5-arg signature (matching the pattern used elsewhere in the same file).
